name: download_file
description: Download a file from Backblaze B2 storage. You can download by file name (using the bucket name and file path) or by file ID. The response body contains the raw file bytes, with metadata in the response headers.

parameters.name: bucketName
parameters.description: The name of the bucket containing the file. Used in the URL path.

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: The full name (including any path prefix) of the file to download.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: Optional byte range header for partial downloads (e.g., 'bytes=0-999').

body._note: Response body contains raw file bytes. Metadata is returned in response headers.
